title: I need a test management tool that integrates with Monday.com
excerpt: Hello everyone. Can someone advice which tool for Test Management (creating test cases, opening bugs) that integrates very good with Monday.com?

posts.author: DianaL (DL)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello everyone. Can someone advice which tool for Test Management (creating test cases, opening bugs) that integrates very good with Monday.com?

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@DianaL ,
Here are some test management tools that integrate with monday.com:
TestLodge
QA Touch
Testmo
qTest
Jira

These tools offer a variety of features, such as test case management, bug tracking, and reporting. They also integrate with monday.com in different ways. For example, some tools allow you to create monday.com boards from test cases, while others allow you to sync test results to monday.com.
If you need any implementation support kindly contact us:

MSquare Support
Visit us here
Youtube Channel

posts.author: DipaliPatankar (Dipali Patankar)
posts.cookedHtml:
@DianaL

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @DianaL

If you’re looking for a test management tool that integrates seamlessly with Monday.com,

TestRail : is a fantastic option. It allows you to create test cases, manage test runs, and track bugs while syncing effortlessly with Monday.com.
Qase : is another solid choice. It offers robust test case management and integrates directly with Monday.com, allowing you to link test cases with tasks and bugs.

posts.author: yethiseo_consulting (Yethi Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: If you’re using Monday.com for project management, finding a test management tool that integrates seamlessly with it can significantly enhance your QA process. Tools like TestRail, PractiTest, and QTest offer robust integrations with Monday.com, enabling teams to manage test cases, track defects, and monitor progress in real time without switching platforms. These integrations streamline communication between QA and development, reduce manual updates, and ensure test activities are aligned with project timelines. By consolidating test management within Monday.com, you can improve efficiency, collaboration, and overall software quality.

posts.author: asherrwood (Scott S)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

Could I suggest taking a look at TestLodge.

There is a two-way integration that’s easy to setup and it will allow you to perform tasks such as creating bug reports automatically when tests fails, adding comments to existing issues and updating / syncing back the issue status.

Please see our monday.com integration video demo, which provides a good overview of the functionality available.

Thanks

posts.author: sibs2013 (Prince Ona)
posts.cookedHtml: You might want to check out Kualitee. It integrates pretty smoothly and lets you manage test cases and bugs while still syncing with your Monday workflows. I’ve found it useful for keeping QA and project management aligned without bouncing between too many tools
